DEPT 01. JUDGE TOMAR MASON. REPORTER:M.NORMAN. CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFT BRANDY TOMS. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN AS TO BRANDY TOMS. CASE SETTLED AS TO DEFT ALBERT TOMS ONLY. WRITTEN STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT SIGNED BY PARTIES & LODGED IN COURT FILE FOR ENTRY AFTER COURT TRIAL OF DEFT BRANDY TOMS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMS, ALBERT TOMS, BRANDY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 626 POLK STREET #406, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-14-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFF WAIVES BACK RENT & DAMAGES. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS & ATNYS FEES. EACH SIDE RELINQUISHES ALL CLAIMS. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXECUTION STATED TO 7-14-95.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, L.
